title: Full-text search via fragment with rank
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.fulltext_search/1` that takes a query string and uses PostgreSQL's to_tsvector/to_tsquery for full-text search on Post.body. Return posts ordered by match rank descending. Use: `fragment("to_tsvector('english', ?) @@ to_tsquery('english', ?)", p.body, ^term)` for the where clause and `fragment("ts_rank(to_tsvector('english', ?), to_tsquery('english', ?))", p.body, ^term)` for the rank. Pin the term. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Full-text search fragment with proper placeholders for both WHERE and ORDER BY. Advanced PostgreSQL feature Claude often botches.
